item.title: By: Sam Pougher
item.dc:creator: Sam Pougher
item.description: Hi Robert, pleasure meeting you guys, hope all goes well on your future travels!
item.content:encoded: Hi Robert, pleasure meeting you guys, hope all goes well on your future travels!

item.title: By: Robert Rogina
item.dc:creator: Robert Rogina
item.description: Hey Sam , we just had lunch with you in Navasota , Texas. Enjoyed the 30 minutes, our best. Robert/Carmen
item.content:encoded:
Hey Sam , we just had lunch with you in Navasota , Texas.
Enjoyed the 30 minutes, our best.
Robert/Carmen

item.title: By: Sam Pougher
item.dc:creator: Sam Pougher
item.description:
Ah, I thought I'd bought it from the guy who bought it from you as it was in pristine condition, not many miles on it at all. It was too big for him apparently, but his loss was my gain!
A link would be great, I'll keep championing your bikes to anyone who'll listen!
item.content:encoded:
Ah, I thought I’d bought it from the guy who bought it from you as it was in pristine condition, not many miles on it at all. It was too big for him apparently, but his loss was my gain!

A link would be great, I’ll keep championing your bikes to anyone who’ll listen!

item.title: By: Richard
item.dc:creator: Richard
item.description: Hi Sam, I'm really glad to have found your blog. Just to give you some background about your bike - yours was the 20th bike I made and I sold it to a guy who was going to cycle to Morocco on it. (I don't think he ever did)In the end it changed hands a couple of times before it ended up with you. I'm so glad its being used how it was intended. Keep up the blog its a really good one, and really useful to others planning a similar adventure. It makes me jealous that I'm not there.... I'll put a link to it on my website if you want. best wishes Richard
item.content:encoded:
Hi Sam, I’m really glad to have found your blog. Just to give you some background about your bike – yours was the 20th bike I made and I sold it to a guy who was going to cycle to Morocco on it. (I don’t think he ever did)In the end it changed hands a couple of times before it ended up with you. I’m so glad its being used how it was intended.
Keep up the blog its a really good one, and really useful to others planning a similar adventure. It makes me jealous that I’m not there…. I’ll put a link to it on my website if you want.
best wishes
Richard

item.title: By: Sam Pougher
item.dc:creator: Sam Pougher
item.description:
Hi Lorna, haven't seen William's post, I'll check out his blog.
I've decided to fly from Almaty to Xi'an, I've already had enough of the cold and snow! I'm pretty disappointed, but at least I can come back and close the loop going south through Kyrgyzstan to Kashgar, which was my original plan before winter crept in!
Happy cycling in Sri Lanka, do you have a blog so I can see how it's going?
item.content:encoded:
Hi Lorna, haven’t seen William’s post, I’ll check out his blog.

I’ve decided to fly from Almaty to Xi’an, I’ve already had enough of the cold and snow! I’m pretty disappointed, but at least I can come back and close the loop going south through Kyrgyzstan to Kashgar, which was my original plan before winter crept in!

Happy cycling in Sri Lanka, do you have a blog so I can see how it’s going?

item.title: By: lorna maren
item.dc:creator: lorna maren
item.description: hi wonder if you rcvd the missive from William who is not too far before you. enjoying your blog. wait eagerly for next monthly installment, am off to cycle Sri Lanka this winter. will see how far you get in spring enjoy. keep pedaling %---%
item.content:encoded: hi wonder if you rcvd the missive from William who is not too far before you. enjoying your blog. wait eagerly for next monthly installment, am off to cycle Sri Lanka this winter. will see how far you get in spring enjoy. keep pedaling %—%

item.title: By: nan and grandad
item.dc:creator: nan and grandad
item.description: Great to hear from you Sam, keep posting ,, Really interesting. Love you
item.content:encoded:
Great to hear from you Sam, keep posting
,,
Really interesting. Love you
